ChangeGatewayPasswordRequest.description: Change the password of the current authenticated session.

currentPassword.description: Current password bound to the active session.
currentPassword.title: Currentpassword

newPassword.description: Replacement password for the active session.
newPassword.title: Newpassword

ChangeGatewayPasswordRequest.title: ChangeGatewayPasswordRequest

EmptyActionRequest.description: Empty payload used by actions that carry no caller-provided parameters.
EmptyActionRequest.title: EmptyActionRequest

LoginGatewaySessionRequest.description:
Authenticate one gateway session.

Args:
    username: Operator login name.
    password: Operator password.

Returns:
    The request payload serialized through :meth:`to_payload`.

Raises:
    ValidationError: Raised by Pydantic when required fields are missing or
        empty.

Boundary behavior:
    Unknown JSON keys are rejected so the login contract cannot silently
    drift from the frontend SDK.
LoginGatewaySessionRequest.title: LoginGatewaySessionRequest

MaintenanceModeRequest.description: Switch maintenance mode through the canonical action plane.
MaintenanceModeRequest.title: MaintenanceModeRequest

RecipeSortRuleRequest.description: One rule shown in the HMI recipe editor.

action.description: Sort action triggered when the condition evaluates to true.
action.title: Action

condition.description: Predicate expression used to match one inspection outcome.
condition.title: Condition

RecipeSortRuleRequest.title: RecipeSortRuleRequest

ResetStationRequest.description: Reset one station fault and optionally resume automation.

reason.description: Optional operator reason stored with the reset request.
reason.title: Reason

resumeAfter.description: Whether the station should resume automation after the fault reset completes.
resumeAfter.title: Resumeafter

ResetStationRequest.title: ResetStationRequest

SaveRecipeRequest.description:
Persist one HMI recipe profile.

The request mirrors the editable recipe profile used by the frontend. It is
intentionally typed so the generated SDK can provide an exact payload shape
instead of falling back to ``Record<string, unknown>``.

changeNote.description: Optional free-form change note persisted into the recipe metadata.
changeNote.title: Changenote

enabled.description: Whether the recipe is currently active in the HMI projection.
enabled.title: Enabled

name.description: Recipe display name shown in the HMI.
name.title: Name

sortRules.description: Ordered HMI sort rules projected into the recipe metadata.
sortRules.title: Sortrules

targetPart.description: Target part or product family described by the recipe.
targetPart.title: Targetpart

thresholdsSummary.description: Human-readable summary of the effective thresholds.
thresholdsSummary.title: Thresholdssummary

updatedAt.description: Optional updated-at timestamp supplied by the HMI editor.
updatedAt.title: Updatedat

updatedBy.description: Optional operator name attributed to the edit.
updatedBy.title: Updatedby

SaveRecipeRequest.title: SaveRecipeRequest

StartBatchRequest.description:
Start one production batch.

Args:
    recipeId: Activated recipe identifier to execute.
    batchId: Optional caller-provided batch identifier.

recipeId.description: Activated recipe identifier used by the next batch run.
recipeId.title: Recipeid

StartBatchRequest.title: StartBatchRequest

SwitchRecipeRequest.description: Validate one recipe and optionally activate it for the next run.

dryRun.description: When true, validate the recipe without activating it.
dryRun.title: Dryrun

recipeId.description: Recipe identifier to validate and optionally activate.
recipeId.title: Recipeid

SwitchRecipeRequest.title: SwitchRecipeRequest

schema.title: Response Legacy Health Api Health Get

get.summary: Get the effective action capability matrix

post.summary: Submit the recipe validation and activation action

get.description:
Return the projected diagnostics snapshot.

Args:
    svc: Bound diagnostics query service.
    _session: Authenticated viewer session.

Returns:
    Standard API envelope containing projected diagnostics items.

Raises:
    No route-specific exception is intentionally raised.

Boundary behavior:
    Diagnostics mutations must use the canonical action plane under
    ``/api/v1/actions/diagnostics/*``. The legacy rollback façade has been
    removed.
